extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR won from a 5-rider sprint at 200m by taking last wheel and timing his jump perfectly past ALAPHILIPPE who led out too early from 1km out
tactical_patterns: VAN AVERMAET attacked on La Redoute forcing favorites' teams to chase, revealing form desperation from non-favorites mid-race
POGAČAR mechanicaled at 65km during the toughest climb sequence but caught back on technical descent where peloton stretched
ALAPHILIPPE led final 1km, too early for 5-rider sprint, POGAČAR took last wheel position and timed jump at 200m
LOTTO placed multiple riders in break then attacked with FLANDERSON, using break teammate to slow chase when caught

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: mechanicaled at 65km during hardest climb sequence yet caught back and won sprint, suggests exceptional freshness from skipping Flèche
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: led out from 1km in 5-rider sprint and got beaten by fresher Pogačar, relegated previous year's win affects finish tactics
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: desperate long-range attack on La Redoute signals nowhere near his LBL-winning form despite AG2R investment
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: reached final 5-rider group and contested sprint, strong ride but lacks explosive speed against Monument winners
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: inexplicably took front too early in final sprint rotation instead of staying on Alaphilippe's wheel
rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: French climber surprisingly third in Monument sprint, better pure speed than expected against sprinters
rider_signals.WOUT VAN AERT: negative: Jumbo-Visma forced to chase Van Avermaet move, burned matches controlling race they didn't win
